landingCopy.hero: Stop wrestling with ChatGPT prompts. Get perfect listing copy in 30 seconds.
landingCopy.subhead: A purpose-built AI workflow for real-estate agents — paste the property details, pick a tone, and ship MLS-ready descriptions, emails, and social captions instantly.
bullets: Built-in best-practice prompts — no prompt engineering required
Export to MLS, email, and social with one click

faq.q: Do I need to know how to write prompts?
faq.a: No. Just paste the property facts and choose a tone — the workflow handles the rest.
Templates are built to avoid fair-housing red flags, and you can review every draft before publishing.
Yes, it's month-to-month with a free tier so you can try before you pay.

socialPosts.text: Real-estate agents: you're spending 45 min/listing writing descriptions. We got it to 30 seconds. Here's how 👇
Most agents use ChatGPT for listings but hate the generic output. The fix isn't a better prompt — it's a workflow that already knows what a great listing looks like.
Before/after: a raw MLS dump → a listing that sells. Same facts, 30 seconds, zero prompt tweaking.
Fair-housing compliance is the #1 reason agents fear AI copy. We bake the guardrails in so you review, not rewrite.
Indie build update: 120 agents on the free tier, 18 converted to paid this week. Vertical > general-purpose. Every time.
Your listing, 3 tones: Luxury, Cozy, Investor. Pick one, ship it. (demo clip)
We don't sell 'AI'. We sell the 44 minutes you get back per listing.
Case study: a solo agent in Austin listed 9 properties last week and wrote zero descriptions by hand. Here's her workflow.
Free tier, no card. Paste a property, watch it write. If it doesn't beat your last listing, don't pay us.
Reply with a property address and I'll generate a listing live. Let's go 🧵

emailSequence.subject: Your first listing is ready 👇
emailSequence.body: Welcome! You're 30 seconds away from your first AI-written listing. Paste any property's details, pick a tone, and hit generate. Reply here if anything's unclear — a real human reads these.

emailSequence.subject: The 3 tones most agents use
emailSequence.body: Luxury for high-end, Cozy for family homes, Investor for cash-flow buyers. Match the tone to the buyer and watch engagement climb. Try all three on your next listing.

emailSequence.subject: Don't get flagged for fair housing
emailSequence.body: AI copy can accidentally use risky language. Our templates avoid the common red flags — but always give each draft a 10-second review. Here's a quick checklist.

emailSequence.subject: She listed 9 homes, wrote 0 by hand
emailSequence.body: A solo agent in Austin runs her entire listing workflow through the tool. Here's exactly how she does it — and how you can copy it this week.

emailSequence.subject: Ready to go unlimited?
emailSequence.body: You've used your free generations. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited listings, saved brand voice, and one-click MLS export — less than the cost of one wasted hour. Upgrade here.
